# **Electronic Press Kit (EPK) - Vozz Rich**  
🎧 *A Fusion of House, Techno, and Big Room Energy* 🎧  

---

## **🎤 Artist Overview**  
**Stage Name:** Vozz Rich  
**Legal Name:** Richard Park  
**Genre Blends:** Electronic, House, Dance, Techno, Big Room  
**Influences:** Detroit House, Underground Raves, Salsa, Global Dance Music  
**Location:** US (Roots in Mexico and California)  
**Email:** vozzrich@gmail.com  
**Phone:** 310-989-8178  

---

## **🎛️ Sound Design & Production**  
Vozz Rich crafts a **dynamic, high-energy sound** that seamlessly blends the raw beats of **Detroit house**, the underground grit of **techno**, and the infectious rhythms of **salsa**. His music is a **sonic journey**, designed to ignite dance floors and captivate listeners with its **bold basslines, intricate rhythms**, and **culturally rich textures**.  

---

## **🎶 Notable Releases & Collaborations**  
### **Tracks:**  
- **"Breathless"** (w/ L25) - Extended Mix & Original  
- **"Don't Want It to End"** (with remixes by Kicevski, Pillars, PYM)  
- **"Get Up On The Floor"** (w/ Franz Kolo)  
- **"Back To The Beat"** & **"Bounce It"**  
- **"House Ablaze"** (upcoming release)  

### **Remixes:**  
- **"Let This One Ride"** (Kelly Reverb & Chad LeMans)  
- **"Dance All Night"** (Jaytor)  
- **"Butterflies"** (Artsychoke)  

---

## **📊 Streaming Performance Metrics**  
### **Spotify:**  
- **Monthly Listeners:** ~24,700 (as of Feb 2025)  
- **Followers:** 4,109  

### **Last.fm Stats:**  
- **Plays Growth:** Steady increase from 608 (Nov 2024) to 729 (Jan 2025)  

### **Track Highlights:**  
- **"Breathless"** and **"Get Up On The Floor"** consistently top streaming charts.  

---

## **📱 Social Media Engagement**  
- **Instagram:** 4,875 followers  
- **SoundCloud:** Active profile with exclusive mixes and tracks  
- **Spotify:** Over 4.1K followers  

---

### **Releases:**  
- **"House Ablaze"** (December 2024)  
- **"Mi Corazon Batalla"** (Extended Mix - August 2024)  
- **"Safe and Sound"** (w/ Kicevski - October 2024)  

### **Remixes:**  
- **"Sofi Disco"** (PAUL PARKER - October 2024)

---

*Vozz Rich’s music is a **sonic celebration of diversity**, blending global influences into an electrifying dancefloor experience. Ready to collaborate, perform, and elevate the electronic music scene!* 🎶🔥
